nasb.text: Take your harp, walk about the city, O forgotten harlot; Pluck the strings skillfully, sing many songs, That you may be remembered.

esv.text: “Take a harp; go about the city, O forgotten prostitute! Make sweet melody; sing many songs, that you may be remembered.”

cnv.text: “你被遺忘的妓女啊！ 拿起琴來，走遍全城吧。 你要巧彈多唱， 使人再想起你！”

ccb.text: “被遗忘的妓女啊， 拿起琴，走遍全城。 要弹得美妙，要多唱几首歌， 好使人再记起你。”

csbs.text: “被遗忘的妓女啊， 拿起竖琴，走遍全城吧！ 要弹得妙、唱得多， 好使人再记起你！”
